---
title: "Contacto"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
.contacto-container {
  max-width: 600px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 3rem 1.5rem;
  text-align: center;
}

.contacto-email {
  font-size: 1.25rem;
  line-height: 1.7;
  color: #374151;
  margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
}

.contacto-email a {
  color: #4E4976;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-decoration: none;
}

.contacto-email a:hover {
  text-decoration: underline;
}

.contacto-redes-titulo {
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #4E4976;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.contacto-redes-links {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 1.5rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.contacto-redes-links a {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 48px;
  height: 48px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4E4976, #453958);
  color: white;
  text-decoration: none;
  font-size: 1.35rem;
  transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
}

.contacto-redes-links a:hover {
  transform: translateY(-3px);
  box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(78, 73, 118, 0.35);
  color: white;
}
</style>

<div class="contacto-container">

<p class="contacto-email">Escríbenos a <a href="mailto:contacto.oles@gmail.com">contacto.oles@gmail.com</a></p>

<p class="contacto-redes-titulo">Síguenos en redes sociales</p>
<div class="contacto-redes-links">
  <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/observatorio-de-violencia-y-legitimidad-social-oles-279449392/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" title="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
  <a href="https://www.instagram.com/oles_cl/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" title="Instagram"><i class="bi bi-instagram"></i></a>
  <a href="https://x.com/OLES_CL" target="_blank" rel="noopener" title="X"><i class="bi bi-twitter-x"></i></a>
</div>

</div>
```
